title: 基础理财规划指南 / Basic Financial Planning Guide
summary: 理财规划是有步骤的过程:目标→收集→分析→方案→执行→检视;涵盖预算、应急、保障、储蓄投资、退休、遗产。 / Financial planning is a stepwise process: goals → gather → analyse → plan → implement → review; covering budgeting, emergency funds, protection, savings/investment, retirement and estate.

sections.heading: 规划流程(6 步)
sections.body: 1) 确立目标;2) 收集资料;3) 分析现状;4) 制定并呈现方案;5) 执行;6) 定期检视与调整。

sections.heading: Process (6 steps)
sections.body: 1) Set goals; 2) gather data; 3) analyse status; 4) develop and present the plan; 5) implement; 6) review and adjust periodically.

sections.heading: 覆盖与优先级
sections.body: 现金流/预算、应急储备、保障、储蓄投资、退休、遗产;一般先保障与应急,再追求增长。

sections.heading: Coverage & priority
sections.body: Cash flow/budget, emergency fund, protection, savings/investment, retirement, estate; generally protection/emergency first, then growth.

keyPoints: 6 步规划流程 / Six-step planning process
先保障应急再增长 / Protection/emergency before growth
定期检视调整 / Review and adjust periodically
